label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this step by step. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner. Let me list out the initial partners first. At the start: - Alice is with Lola. - Bob is with Izzi. - Claire is with Sam. - Dave is with Patrick. - Eve is with Karl. Now, throughout the song, there are several partner switches. Let me go through each one carefully. First switch: Claire and Bob switch partners. So, initially, Claire is with Sam and Bob is with Izzi. After they switch, Claire will be with Izzi, and Bob will be with Sam. So after first switch: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Sam - Claire: Izzi - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Second switch: Claire and Alice switch partners. Claire is currently with Izzi, and Alice is with Lola. So after switching, Claire will take Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice will take Claire's previous partner (Izzi). So: After second switch: - Alice: Izzi - Claire: Lola - Bob: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Third switch: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is with Sam, Claire is with Lola. After switching, Bob will have Lola, and Claire will have Sam. After third switch: - Alice: Izzi - Bob: Lola - Claire: Sam - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Karl Fourth switch: Eve
